_note: Edit this file to update the Experience timeline. Newest first. 'end': null means Present.

items.summary: Designing and building scalable data platforms and analytics layers to deliver reliable, production-ready data across the company.
highlights: Own the company data platform end to end — ingestion, modeling, orchestration, and serving layers.
Build analytics-ready data models that power product, finance, and operations reporting.
Establish data quality checks, documentation, and conventions for long-term maintainability.

items.summary: Delivered analytics solutions that enabled data-driven decision-making across product, finance, and operations.
highlights: Built dashboards and reporting foundations used across product, finance, and operations teams.
Translated business questions into clean, reusable SQL models and metrics.
Partnered with engineering to improve data reliability upstream of analytics.

items.summary: Supported business and operational decision-making with datasets, analytical models, and automated data workflows.
highlights: Developed datasets and analytical models to support business and operational decision-making.
Analyzed trends and performance metrics to identify opportunities for process and strategy improvements.
Contributed to database development and automated data collection workflows.
